task:
OBS Studio is open with a scene collection that already contains three scenes — 'Scene 1', 'Scene 2', 'Scene 3' — each holding a basic source.

Rename the scenes exactly:
- 'Scene 1' → 'Main View'
- 'Scene 2' → 'Closeup'
- 'Scene 3' → 'Wide Shot'

Add these new sources with these exact names and types:
- To 'Main View': Text (FreeType 2) named 'Overlay Text' (any text)
- To 'Wide Shot': Color Source named 'Stage Light'

All sources (old and new) must be visible. Do NOT create or delete any scenes — the collection must still have exactly 3 scenes. Persist the changes to the scene collection JSON.

verification.description: Source 'Overlay Text' exists in 'Main View' scene
Source 'Stage Light' exists in 'Wide Shot' scene
